# init()

**Initializer**

Initializes a new, empty rule system.

## Declaration

```swift
init()
```

## Return Value

A rule system object.

## Discussion

A newly created rule system contains no state, rules, or facts.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].
title: init()
